q: Do you like to take scenery pictures?
examiner_note: Đây là một câu hỏi mở rộng của chủ đề nhiếp ảnh và phong cảnh. Bạn nên tập trung vào lý do tại sao bạn thích thể loại ảnh này (ví dụ: vẻ đẹp tĩnh lặng, sự hùng vĩ của thiên nhiên). Hãy nhắc đến các yếu tố kỹ thuật như 'lighting', 'framing', 'wide-angle'. Bạn có thể so sánh giữa việc chụp ảnh chân dung (portraits) và ảnh phong cảnh (scenery) để làm nổi bật sở thích.

band7.text: Yes, I really enjoy taking scenery pictures. Whenever I go hiking or visit a new city, I take my camera to capture the beautiful views. I think scenery photos are much more relaxing to look at later than pictures of people.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp và đưa ra ví dụ cụ thể (hiking, new city). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên (capture, relaxing).

band8.text: Absolutely. I find landscape photography to be incredibly fulfilling. There’s something special about freezing a magnificent sunset or a tranquil mountain range in a frame. I especially enjoy experimenting with different lighting and angles to get the perfect shot. It’s a great way to preserve the beauty of nature.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng chuyên môn nhẹ (landscape photography, magnificent, frame, experimenting with lighting). Cách diễn đạt mạch lạc.

band9.text: Indeed, I’m a passionate landscape photography enthusiast. I’m particularly drawn to the challenge of capturing the raw, unadulterated beauty of the natural world. For me, it’s not just about snapping a photo; it’s about understanding the interplay between light and shadow and finding a unique perspective. I find that scenic photography allows me to translate the silent majesty of nature into a visual narrative.
band9.note: Từ vựng cực kỳ học thuật và giàu tính nghệ thuật (unadulterated, interplay, perspective, translate, silent majesty, visual narrative). Cách lập luận rất sâu sắc và tinh tế.

v.example: Landscape photography requires a lot of patience to wait for the right light.

v.meaning: vẻ đẹp thuần khiết/không bị pha tạp
v.example: The remote island offered scenes of unadulterated beauty.
The interplay of light and shadow on the building was fascinating.
The photo series creates a powerful visual narrative of the war.
We stood in awe of the silent majesty of the ancient redwood trees.
Photographs make moments feel frozen in time.
Changing your perspective can completely change a photograph.
The soft evening lighting was perfect for a portrait.
Natural elements like trees are great for framing a subject.
A wide-angle lens is essential for capturing vast landscapes.
The website has a clean and modern aesthetic.
The palace is a magnificent building.
The hotel offers a panoramic view of the coastline.
The view from the top of the mountain was breathtaking.
She looked stunning in her red dress.
The sunset was full of vivid colors like pink and purple.
The library is a tranquil place to work.
The meditation helped her find a sense of serenity.
Many tourists visit Switzerland for its scenic beauty.
As a nature enthusiast, Jim spends every weekend camping.
The artist tried to capture the essence of the city in his sketches.

v.meaning: loại máy ảnh nhỏ gọn, tự động
v.example: I prefer a professional DSLR over a point-and-shoot camera.
A high resolution photo has great detail even when zoomed in.

v.meaning: bộ sưu tập kỹ thuật số
v.example: My phone's digital gallery is organized by date and location.
Instagram is the most popular social media platform for sharing photos.
Photoshop is the industry standard for photo editing software.
This filter makes everything look like an old movie.

v.meaning: hậu kỳ (xử lý sau khi chụp)
v.example: Post-processing is a vital part of professional photography.
Long exposure is needed to capture the night sky.
The composition of the painting is very balanced.
The sound of the camera shutter is very satisfying.
You need a tripod to keep the camera steady for long shots.

v.meaning: độ sâu trường ảnh/độ mờ hậu cảnh
v.example: A shallow depth of field helps the subject stand out.

v.meaning: ngọn núi (thường dùng trong văn chương/tên riêng)
v.example: Mount Everest is the highest mountain in the world.
The tiny houses were scattered across the green valley.
The Grand Canyon was carved by the Colorado River.
We hiked for miles to see the majestic waterfall.
The lighthouse stands on a rugged coastline.
The forest looked very mysterious on a misty morning.
After the rain, the field was a lush green color.
The ship disappeared over the horizon.
The mountain's reflection on the lake was perfect.
I love the symmetry in classical architecture.
The top of the tower is an excellent vantage point.
The Northern Lights are a truly spectacular sight.

v.meaning: đầy tuyệt vọng/khiến người khác nể sợ
v.example: The sheer scale of the building is awe-inspiring.
The song is very evocative of my childhood.
The dance was mesmerizing to watch.
A telescope can magnify distant stars.
Seeing the world through a lens changes your perspective.
